sections.paragraph:
fut. יִקְצֹב-

(1) to cut down, e.g. a tree, 2Ki 6:6.

(2) to shear sheep, Son 4:2. (Kindred roots are חָצַב, חָטַב. But all roots beginning with the letters קצ have the notion of cutting, cutting off, cutting down, as properly belonging to this stock, see קָצָה , קָצַר , קָצַץ , קָצַע , which are easily transferred to the notions of scraping (see קצע) and judging, deciding, see קָצִין . The same power belongs to the syllables חץ, גז, קט, גד, see גָּדַד , גָּזַז , חָצַץ , קָטַב .) Hence-
